review_text: Une très belle adresse pour séjourner à Margaret River en famille. Ce que nous retenons surtout, c’est la gentillesse de l’équipe, vraiment aux petits soins et toujours prête à rendre service avec le sourire. Quand on voyage avec des enfants, ce genre d’accueil fait toute la différence et permet de profiter sereinement de l’étape. Nous avons passé un excellent séjour et recommandons sans hésiter ce tourist park.

We stayed for one night in  cabin no. 47 in mid-May.
The cabin was very spacious, clean and had everything that one would need for a very comfortable and enjoyable stay. It appeared newish and modern. It even had two bathrooms.
It was one of the very good cabins that we have stayed in.
I would definitely recommend the place.

Enjoyed our stay on an ensuite site, clean and tidy on arrival.
Very quiet park, no problems sleeping for the light sleepers.
Good space between sites.
En Suite im schlechten Zustand und nicht sauber. Service lässt auch zu Wünschen übrig.

Fabulous caravan park, walking distance to the quaint town centre.
We spent a week on an ensuite powered site.
The ensuite was spacious, clean with instant hot water.
The site itself was spacious, with mature, shady trees. Particularly beautiful at this time of year, being Autumn. A big thank you to the park staff maintaining clean sites with the endless shower of leaves.
Reception was welcoming and informative.
Enjoyed our stay and recommend it to others.
Fake grass which is nice when raining. Paid $56 for one night with power, the most expensive of my trip but also the nicer.
Good sites, clean amenities. Short walk to town. I just think Margaret River is overrated all round. A bit hippy, beer over priced, but did love the caravan park
A nice location close to town. With nice rooms.

Great stay with our soccer team and families.
About 30 of us had a great time
Pool
Bbq areas
Indoor kitchens and eating areas
Tv room with ping pong table
Really great 2 bed apartments
Our cabin was perfect and had a dishwasher for easy holiday cooking.

Stayed at Margaret River Tourist Park recently and unfortunately the experience was quite disappointing.

Issues we encountered:
- Strong urine (“piss”) smell as soon as we walked into the room
- Beds were very uncomfortable and made it hard to get a good night’s sleep
- TV is not a smart TV — limited to basic local channels only
- WiFi is extremely weak and practically unusable
- Mobile reception is poor (only 1 bar of 4G and still unreliable)
- Rooms are outdated and in need of renovation
- Pool is not heated, which makes it unpleasant to use in cooler weather
- Pool depth ranges from 1m to 2m — not ideal for families with young kids
- Overall cleanliness and upkeep could be improved

Summary:
While the location is decent, the facilities and overall comfort fall well below expectations. Between the poor smell, uncomfortable beds, lack of connectivity, and outdated rooms, the stay didn’t feel good value for money. With some serious upgrades and better maintenance, this place could be much better — but in its current state, it’s hard to recommend!
Great location, close to main street in town centre. Has everything you need.
Great position. Walking distance to shops and trails. Friendly and helpful staff  Bathrooms need an update
Great park. Cabins are nice. Friendly staff. Good pool and walking distance to town. Quiet and relaxing.

We loved our stay at the park. It was clean and tidy and the staff are super friendly and helpful. The location is walking distance to the local shops, parks and bush walks. We will definitely be back

非常好的住宿區域，在瑪格麗特河的市區。
櫃檯只到17:00，
如果要晚點check-in，
請記得聯繫後續處理。
有公共區域可以煮飯，或是打桌球。
也有共用泳池。
晚上天上的星星銀河清晰可見，
在房間裡也非常安靜，價格合理，
非常推薦來這裡休憩。
Quiet park in a good location, close to town. The facilities and upkeep were okay. Staff were friendly and helpful.
Right near the centre of Margaret River. Great place for a caravan park with good amenities.

I stayed many times and i love it. The caravan is beautiful with all facilities well taken care off. The pool and bbq are so well maintained. The rooms are comfy and well set up. Shoutout to Kaysi, Tony, Danny and Kate for such an amazing service.

Definitely coming here every time i stay in Margs.

This was one of the worst hotels we've ever stayed in. Upon check-in, the room reeked of a nauseating stench. There was feces around the toilet, bloodstains on the sheets, and the floor and sofa were filthy and greasy.

We requested a room change, but the front desk said there were no vacancies. However, we clearly saw many rooms were empty. The staff were indifferent and unhelpful. He agreed to let us check out, but we couldn't book any rooms in the surrounding area, so we had no choice but to stay.

This hotel ruined our night and gave us a terrible experience. The actual condition of the hotel is completely different from the online ratings and reviews. We strongly advise against staying at this hotel.

This hotel was absolutely terrible. The entire room was greasy and had a very pungent smell. We immediately asked to change rooms, but the front desk refused. We saw many other empty rooms. They were incredibly unfriendly! The Agoda review says 8.7! That's a complete rip-off! It was awful!!!

And I was check in on 13/3/2026

Lovely clean caravan park. We had an ensuite which was super nice. Park well set up and laundry facilities great. Camp kitchen was good too.|20min walk into town. Close to all the main things to do. |We had a lovely time|Would stay here again.

Great location, it was close enough to walk into town. The park was quiet and well kept. Stayed in a cabin that was clean and well presented. The bed was very comfortable. The staff were very friendly and helpful. We will definitely stay there again if we return to the area in the future.

Nice pool, clean bathrooms/kitchen and can walk to town. But we were kept awake by campers shouting and singing. Our camp site was small, roadside and under a street light (P35) - $63 a night with the Gday discount.

We stay here when in Margs as you can walk into town, it’s really well maintained and they have a 9.30pm curfew which they remind everyone staying every day by text. It’s quiet at night which we all loved. |Very clean accommodation and a really comfortable bed
Loved the location easy walk into the town.
5 stars
We got the powered campsite, we had a very nice stay, the place has been well maintained, toilets were always very clean, and the location is great! Highly recommend!
Great little place to stay.
loved our stay here, receptionists where super lovely, gorgeous place.
Fantastic park, kids absolutely loved it and made new friends instantly. There's a inflatable pillow, and a nice deep pool. BBQ's are in great condition and worked perfectly.
Did the job perfectly. Friendly staff at check in.
Top Campingplatz - gute Lage zum Town Center und alles super sauber - wir haben unsere 2 Nächte auf einem schönen schattigen Stellplatz (52) sehr genossen! Vielen Dank !
Great place for a short stay at Margaret River.
We had a lodge for a week.  There basic, but has everything you need. They have an outside pool and other amenities for guests.

Stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin. Cabin was very clean and spacious. Staff were very friendly upon check in. Price felt slightly high, but it's to be expected in peak season and after a positive experience felt it was worth the cost.
Arrived staff were friendly cabin was clean 2 bedroom 2 bathroom being school holidays there is a lot of people but not noisy quite peaceful

el personal es demasiado desatento. quise reservar por una noche más ( en persona) y me dijeron que no tenían disponibilidad y que estaban full booked , a los 10 minutos llame por teléfono y tenían de todo. no sé si son racistas o que, pero le mando un saludo a la chica rubia de ojos claros de la administración que me dijo que no había nada.

The location is good, but just like what the others said, the facilities is pretty worn out.||We are staying in the cabin with pictured printed kn the brochure. It does look good on the outside, spacious parking area, slightly leveled so people walking around won't peek into our cabin immediately. ||However, the pipe is so old that every time I open the cupboard, a strong oxidised smell would come out. I was also feel upset that utensils wasn't particularly clean when they asked and put signs everywhere to keep clean, dry and put back but did not offer them in a good condition in the first place. The water temp wasn't stable too. I was particularly frustrated with the noise from ppl talking on the yard, outside of their room but just next to our bedroom during the night. I could hear every word they said.. It was so disturbing that my husband once thought I was watching video.||We have stayed in other 4 tourist parks with Tasman, Tourist park and RAC and this was a really bad experience.
Perfect
Fab location with shady spots and friendly staff

We booked Margaret River Tourist Park via G'Day Parks.
It was a great choice. Quite close to the City Centre.
Well organised, well run.
Our Cabin was neat and tidy, stayed three nights.
The Service and staff were very helpful - Thank you.
Check-in and out was simple.
We enjoyed our stay.
Well recommended.
Thank you.

Unfortunately this holiday park could've been a lot better, all the facilities are very dated, kitchens were always left in a dirty condition. The outside barbeque only worked for 10 minutes at a time and cut out making it hard to cook food.
But by far the worst part of our stay was the customer service we received, or if you can even call it customer service!
The lady on the front desk has the most appalling attitude throughout our stay. She was condescending and spoke to our group with a patronising tone, especially as we had only gone into reception to let them know the power was out in the kitchen and the fridges were therefore not working. There was no reason for her to speak down at us like naughty school children, and I really didn't appreciate the unfriendliness and negative vibe I received during the Christmas holidays from your staff members
However the WiFi worked well and the location of the park is fantastic and very close to margs, and I would recommend it for those reasons only, it was also super family friendly and there were lots of facilities for children.
Great location, professional service, clean rooms - was exactly what we needed for a three day holiday with family. Highly recommend!
The location is good, short drive to restaurants and main street in town.  Surprised that no shampoo, no body wash provided.Noise insulation is very poor, got woken up twice by next door neighbour.
This place is peaceful and Walking distance to town. staff member's are helpful and quick  respond to my concerned.thank you  I really appreciate that.

Wonderfully friendly reception staff and so helpful. Cabin was a little dated but a good size and reasonably well equipped. Located around a 20 minute walk from down town, it's an ideal location. Margaret River is really lovely with lots of walks and cycling.
Ruhiger Campingplatz

Over priced and was dirty was boogies in the shower from previous people staying marks on the quilt cover floor was sticky the sink had all food in it in the plug. WiFi is non existent. Terrible! Do not recommend!

This Caravan park is a nice location but was loud until about 2am with children riding bikes and running around the park with no parents in sight. This is not a place to stay for camping in a peaceful environment unfortunately,  the staff were friendly however i was contacted multiple times after i checked out and was asked to check out and was told i was taking up someone's booked site when i wasnt even at the park, I understand mix ups happen but we would have appreciated if we were asked if we were still there rather than being instantly accussed instead of a staff member walking to the site to ask who it was, I received a number of calls, texts and voicemails so it was an unpleasant surprise. We would recommend this park for future stays, it is very family friendly.
Nice place, we just got stuck in a shit spot, more for camper vans than a caravan, so not ideal. Great location, nice staff.
Excellent rapport qualité prix

I stayed in a powered site. Based on my experience in other campgrounds, the sites here felt quite close to each other, with limited space for tents and caravans, and the cabins located directly in front made it feel a bit crowded. The camp kitchen could have been cleaner. It’s a convenient option if you want to stay close to town and don’t mind the lack of space or privacy. However, if you’re looking for a relaxing holiday with good amenities, this might not be the ideal place.
Caravan spots are paved and the garden are very tidy.
The staff were pleasant and efficient, rooms neat clean and tidy, noise; level  very quiet service was great and the value we considered reasonable. Amenities satisfactory.
Very good location, just 5 minutes driving to two big  supermarket, they are a lot of equipment inside the room which can cook ourself
Very Very lovely
Caravan powered sight was  a good spot
Amazing location, friendly staff and the units were beautifully clean, i cant say enough good words about it thoroughly enjoyed our stay there and will definatley be back. 😁

Fantastic location, 10 mins walk to shops, cafes and bars. Skatepark and dog exercise oval also a few minutes walk. Staff were friendly on arrival and offered a list of dog friendly places in the region. Sites are small but manageable. The amenities were clean and decent sized with plenty of space to get changed. The pool was nice and warm and although we didn’t utilise the playground or jumping pillow, they seemed popular. We really enjoyed our stay and will definitely return.
Stayed on a caravan site for three nights great friendly park, Good ammenities and close to main town.
Loves the common area with kitchen, ping pong table and sofa. The attached toilet for caravan is not very clean.

The park is a good walking distance from town.  The amenities are a bit old however are kept clean and stocked.
Our site was quite long but not very wide.
There was not enough room for 2 vans and 2 cars if your neighbour parked away from there van. If I could suggest clearly marking the site lines so there is no mistaking where you site ends. (see photo)
The park issues you with a fob which gives access to the boom gate and amenities. Could I suggest this is only slightly better than being given a key. It is extremely annoying to head to the bathroom or out the gate to find you have left your fob/key behind. When you are busting to go this can be a problem 😭😵‍💫🥹 I think key pads are also annoying however you can't forget them. Also who is coming to the park to use the bathroom that you need to lock them anyway. Rant over.
Yes, I would stay again as it is a great spot to explore the area.
Amenities are very tired. We couldn’t fit our car on site if we were to put the awning out. Good location though.|I paid for 4 nights but left early, just wasn’t  happy there.

We stayed 6 nights on a powered site.
Bathrooms were clean . Staff were very friendly and helpful

Nice person on reception.
Cabin was a good size but the kitchen space tricky to navigate  great to have the camp kitchen close by.  Really clean and quiet location
Nice place that is affordable with good facilities

I booked two nights at MR Tourist Park. The ladies at the front reception were so lovely on arrival and gave me recommendations for where to watch the sunset. The check in process is very quick and easy, the site itself was easy to navigate. Definitely the smallest site I had stayed on so far. I ended up leaving a day early, not for any fault of the park. I was trying to soak up the sun in the next destination before a weekend of rain.
The bathroom amenities were tidy enough.
Great location, lovely accommodation, excellent place to be.
The park is def showing its age. It rained a fair bit and the place was very sodden with no drainage.

The staff are so friendly and accomodating. They continue to provide a wonderful opportunity for our groups on an annual basis. The park, kitchen/games/recreation room and ablution blocks are always immaculately maintained.
Kelmscott SHS.
Clean amenities and park in general. The pool and the kids jumping pillow look good.

Great camp. No toiletries in cabin.
Walking distance to town. Dog friendly

Exceptional customer service.

Amenities where clean and tidy. Over all i highly reccomend this accomadation very much. Dog friendly but there are some rules which is great. Highly reccomeneded :)

Friendly and helpful staff. Caravan sites are paved with grass surrounding the area. Good clean amenities. TV reception can be average.
Camp kitchen is small however has the essential facilities.
A small separate room with a couch and TV however no AC.
Overall definitely worth staying here.
I stayed there during the summer and didn’t want to miss the chance to post a good review for such a complete campsite and the kind, wonderful people who work there ❤️
Meticulously maintained, if slightly daggy, units. Everything is good quality.

Powered Van site reasonable priced nice facilities & fantastic communication with several text messages throughout or short stay to inform us of not only works being carried out in the park but also to alert us to weather warnings for the area. Great walking distance to main street shops.
Great spot, we were there in the off season
A great location and a wonderful cabin, very comfortable, but no wifi was a let down as we are travelling with roaming charges! Otherwise a fabulous stay.
Clean ensuit.. top spot

We got absolutely flooded out of our tent during our second night. My bed broke and so did our gazebo; everything was wet. The staff were so kind to upgrade us to a different site that had better drainage and even our own ensuite! This made our shitty morning so much better, it was easy to move all our stuff as it wasn’t too far and they supplied us with towels to dry everything. Super accommodating staff! We brought our Labrador as well and there was no fee for her. Minus the weather, everything was great! Will be back when we are coming down again
Good location.

We stayed in a cabin.
Very comfortable during the
storm warning.
Had kids TV for the times stuck indoor.
Full kitchen
Had everything we needed.
Wad clean and tidy on arrival.
Will stay here again.
No photos.
Was busy either indoors or exploring other tourist things.
Cabin made a great base
We were on a unpowered campsite. It was great, the showers were clean, you can go to margaret river town easily by walking

The cottage we booked was great value for money! The bed had a heater, which was perfect for winter. Don’t forget to bring your own toiletries as they are not provided.

What we absolutely loved was the free Tesla/EV charging! Such a bonus! Got our car 100% charged!! ❤️👌🏽

Location to town was on point, although the sites are not huge they are functional. Amenities are a bit dated, however kept very clean by the team. Friendly service on the front counter and we were able to rearrange our site when we felt we wanted something a little different.

Overall a really great stay, location and team!
Cottage was value for money. Everything you need was provided and was clean and comfortable. Check-in staff were very helpful and friendly. Great stay.

Large flat sites. Three seperate bathroom and laundry facilities, coin operated except for one set of dryers with paywave. Reception will only give change for cash no EFTPOS for coins. About 1km back from the main street, was pretty quiet when we stayed on a Saturday night.
Great location just a walk to town.  Amenities clean and very quiet campground.
Beautiful place to stay. Has everything you need. Neat and tidy plus clean
Very clean and our concerns have been addressed very quickly.
Pretty close to the town center.  Our stay was only short.  The cabin was clean and tidy. Had all the mod cons there.  Shower good.  But don't forget your own soap. Their soap is small but ok.
Great park. Close to a lot of tourist attractions. Suits us.

We stayed here with my family and my mom, and we had a great experience. The place was clean, peaceful, and well-organised. The staff were friendly and helpful, and everything we needed was close by. It was a comfortable and relaxing stay - perfect for a family trip. We would definitely come back!

Great service from friendly professional staff. After a minor mixup with our booking the team went to work in shuffling a few things around for us to accomodate our second night.|Thank you for the amazing customer service|This park is in a very good location and is closest to main are of Marg River with the tavern, shops and of course the amazing bakery all in reasonable walking distance.|Overall a great stay.

Only a 10 minute walk from the main strip, this place is a dream to stay at. The tourist park has many great points to it! The cabins have a well prepped kitchen with many utensils and cooking equipment to adequately cook with, as well as being very clean and well maintained. The tourist park has good amenities for kids and adults.

Forget the industrial thing
It's the best place in town. So close to the centre. I know
Amazing place! We have rented a cabin there and it was fabulous, very clean, confortable and great location. We will definately stay there next year!
Lovely spot to stay in Margaret River.

top caravan park
one of the best we have stayed in on our travels
Good location,  close to city centre 👌

This place is the best place to stay in Margaret river for 3 hours drive.

The bathroom and the toilet all in 1 so clean and the staff are so friendly and down to earth compare to people in Perth.

I would recommend for anyone planning to head down to Margaret river stay at this place but u have to book the place earlier because it can get really full and so popular place to stay at camp site.

Make sure u are like prepared maybe 2 days earlier for food preparation when u heading in Margaret river so that u can relax when u booked at this place until dinner time.

I will come back to this place again to sleep when im planing to head down to Margaret river this town so peaceful nothing like Perth and the environment so wonderful like natural nature and get out of big city.

Small town like this is enough.

Also, its a very good experience and get it feel what it’s like to share a kitchen with others and more like independent on camp site and if you have kids and kids can make friends and more social and interactive with others.

When u down here go explore out there,their heaps of other things to do like tasting foods or drinks too. They have  huge company farm of fresh produce of vegetables and fruits in Margaret river region people here are naturally environment and eco friendly.

We stayed in the 2 bedroom cottage, rooms are a generous with good amenities. Good value for money and staff were friendly. Only knock was that WiFi was poor and mobile reception was spotty in most of the park.
Very clean cabin, nice 2 bed rooms with hot shower. Kitchen is very well equipped. superb!! I only stayed one night, wish I could stayed longer here. So comfortable:)
Will definitely stay again

Lovely little spot. Stayed in a studio that was spacious and quiet. There was a lot of privacy also. We rented out canoes for an hour in the morning for 15 dollars, and would advice others to do the same.
Good little cabins, nice linen, excellent shower, getting in and out and check in was easy, would stay again when visiting Margs
Powered site
Clean and tidy cabin, well kept premises, comfortable bed.
Rooms are good and they have good service. The price is very fair and l enjoyed my stay. Its a place anyone can live, very clean and good.
Great place

Upgraded at no extra to 2 bedroom cottage which was very big and much appreciated.  All good except wifi was poor, hard to park car and TV not streamable. Very quiet off road park and looks very kid friendly, staff great too.
Although we only stayed overnight, it was lovely. The chalet we stayed in had everything. All we needed to take was food
Great place to stay!
A bit overpriced ordinary tourist park, no daily service room provided.
Clean and very nice!
Close to amenities ,very small play area but close to playgrounds in town  ,terribly hard to sleep as no insulation and possums running in roof space all night non stop.

Three nights in a powered campsite. 69$ pn, booked in advance due public holidays. Camping was busy but very enjoyable and quiet. Amenities were clean. Friendly staff.
Very close walking to the city centre

Park is nice but in an industrial area. Not really an issue as still able to walk 15 mins to The River Tavern for dinner. Nice pool. Our site was extremely tight and backing in with cars parked opposite was challenging. Dog friendly.
Busy park, plenty of options. Clean amenities

I stayed one night in a studio cabin.|It had everything that you would need, it was very comfortable and clean.|The park was very quiet at night which was great.|The location of the park is very close to town, you could walk in which is handy.|Would stay here again
There is only One AC Which is only in Living area. Rooms are nice and worth it in the price I paid. Clean and tidy rooms.

good clean amenities
good location
nice reception staff, rude male cleaner

unlevelled camp site
loud road right next door to unpowered camp sites
really crowded camp sites
Nice place to stay. Close to Town centre.
A great park handy to shops, restaurants, etc. Has a pool, bbqs, and playground. The ablution blocks are clean and tidy and the kitchens are well equipped

This was a great stay, it was very clean and close to town. The only issues we had was the wifi was only really accessible from communal areas and phone reception wasn’t good, which made it hard for us to plan during our trip. Other than that it was a great stay for a couple of nights.

My husband and I had an amazing stay over Christmas and New Year's. The park is located a short walk from town with all amenities you would need and by a river and woodlands area giving you endless options for peaceful walks. We were always greeted with smile and a friendly face when arriving at the reception. Steph and Olly (the park managers) couldn't be more helpful if they tried, nothing was too much trouble for them to make our stay unforgettable. The cabin was super clean and very well equipped (seriously - you even get a cheese grater). The park offered everything we needed to truly slow down and take a break from our busy life.
Great location and well organised very well. Plenty of things to do for the kids
Great place, nice and clean. Recommended for people with caravans.
Good location, nice clean facilities, reasonably priced
Had a powered site. Close to shops and all amenities
Lovely bird life, grass, trees, friendly service. Secure and safe. Great for kids.  A bit packed in though.

Have been coming here at various times of the year for nearly 20 years, including for the past decade our now traditional 2 week break over Chrissy/New Years with the rest of our family in other sites and cabins along with us. Great location walking distance from the centre of town (great for restaurants and drinking responsibly with dinner), with the benefit of paved roads and sites to keep the inside of your van clean (especially great in winter), whilst still camping amongst the trees. The current crew that are on front desk and looking after the grounds are super friendly and will happily bend over backwards to make your stay a great one. I feel they have really worked hard to step things up and make everyone feel looked after, especially at this time of yearn when I am sure they would rather be with their own families. Even though we haven't really had any issues in the past, the current team are all a great asset that have really taken things up an extra notch with service.
Spacious and clean area, we camped here for more than a week, the toilet is also clean and safe. They provide a playground for children, a BBQ area, a kitchen and a TV room too,  full fasilitas
Good clean facilities with fantastic staff. Easy walk 500m to the main Street.

We enjoyed our stay so much we stayed twice as long as intended. The park had all the amenities you could reasonably expect and was well run by friendly and professional staff. It's just a ten minute walk into the centre of Margaret River and its extensive choices of bars, shops and restaurants.  It's also not much more than ten minutes drive to some marvellous coastal beaches. A thoroughly enjoyable stay in our campervan. Our pitch had plenty of room for our vehicle
Had a great long weekend here. Amenities had all we needed and the friendly staff went far and above to make our stay even better. We’ll be back

Close to town and overall not too bad. Sites are close to another and there was quite some noise the entire time from 5am (kids playing) to after midnights (grown-ups playing). Some lads kept a generator running, music was played, communal drinking, kids, etc. Amenities are old but clean. Staff did not enforce quiet time after 9.30pm as advertised in terms, wouldn’t go back therefore.

Loved the park close to town and all amenities. Not far to other attractions.

Thoughly enjoyed our 🌟 stay
The campsite is close to the town of Margaret River. The facilities are clean and the staff are friendly.
Lovely clean rooms, convenient to walk into town, nice and quiet at night
Just perfect that's all.
Excellent little caravan park. Great value for money! Would stay here again if in the area. Jumping pillow and playground a big bonus. Kitchen well appointed, cabin comfortable for our 3 night stay.
We have enjoyed our time here but surely the management should have asked before they put 3 lots of vans and tents in behind us.  Definitely not marked on the site map.
Value for money. Easy to find, big room and clean.
Great location, camping and the camp kitchens were great and everything was clean and easy to use
We had a powered site that was ok but was not aware that their drains for the sullage hose did not work until ours flooded our neighbours site.
Nice small park close to town. Some sites need to have concrete pads or grass matting for the annexe area as the wet weather on dirt doesn't go well with caravan floors.
Lovely chalet.  Clean and bright.
Great park walking distance to the city centre and shops. Clean modern amenities. Good size kitchen /games room with big screen TV.

Stayed with our own caravan,  booked site with on suite, clean comfortable,  nice park, good campers kitchen, don't wonder too far from your own loo, you can't use and other toilets with out a code, otherwise good spot.
Good trip

We stayed on a powered ensuite site, park is located close to town and well maintained & very clean with lots of shade & grassed areas. Lots of different types of accommodation. Our site was at the back of the park and as sites are smallish it was a bit tight getting our 19.5ft van in & out. Would stay here again.

We have been staying at this campsite for 5 days and it is the third night where they steal things from the fridge, which are in closed bags with name and site number.

They tore open my bag to take out the food inside.
Milks, eggs, hummus, meat, bread and chocolates.

I go to the reception to leave a complaint about the situation, they tell me that I am not the first person to complain about this and that they believe that during the night someone is stealing.
They tell me they can't close the kitchen during the night in case someone needs to use it, and there is a sticker on the kitchen window with 24 hour cameras, but then the girl at the front desk says there are no cameras.
Besides paying dearly to sleep here, they lie about their security.

The lack of concern and intention to solve the problem is a shame.
Possible to provide an urgent hotline service after 6pm as not everyone is fully aware that its Reception closed after 6pm.

A well run Park by what seems essentially young people.  (I haven’t forgotten Chris).  The front office girls are terrific and happy to assist in any way.  They printed documents for me, advised when mail arrived and facilitated every request.  A great bunch.  The facilities in and around the park were well maintained and the place has a real good feel about it.  I would highly recommend this park to anyone who is lucky enough to find themselves in Margaret River.
Caravan sites are a little small. If you have your awning out there is no room for your motor vehicle.
Beautiful area
All staff were kind and friendly.The rooms were spacious and comfortable for me.I really enjoyed my trip to southern Western Australia.Thank you!
Excellent park and helpful staff

The place is awesome, we can only speak for the newer cabins which were really nice. Electric hot water so it’s hot and instantaneous, all the chalets have solar panels all over the roof. Single beds were a bit hard and the pillows thin but they have extra pillows in the wardrobe so that’s probably more of a subjective experience. Very clean, great air con, great location, price was very good compared to other places around. There’s little things maybe, like having a rain cover over the gate access point when you wind down your window, it was pouring down at the time, but that’s a bit of a first world problem whinge. Overall, would definitely recommend.

We stayed in a 3 bedroom chalet for the first time as there were 5 of us. We had family from overseas. Very disappointing.  Place was infested with flies and the shower heads do not work. The floor boards were damp throughout. No shower gel was supplied. One spare plastic bag for rubbish for 5. How much does it actually cost management to supply a hotel size shower gel and extra rubbish bags?? The facility is making money out of a very poor service. We have used this park in the past under different management. It was much better run and service was commendable. I will not be using Margaret River Tourist park again.

The two bedroom rooms smell old and need to be aired out.the smell is not pleasant each time entering the unit. Feel like the cleaning products used was trying to mask the musky unpleasant odor. Good location easy check in out process

Lovely little caravan park. We stayed in the cottage cabins at the very back of park near the road. It was very clean and surprisingly quiet. My son loved the jumping pillow. The only thing I didn’t like was the terrible wifi but it gave us time to build lego and that was special so thanks guys we will be back

It’s a neat and clean tourist park.
They have jumping castle, playground and swimming pool for activity.
It was a nice experience to stay at Margaret River Tourist Park.
Small & peaceful ground. Clean amenities. Walking distance from the city centre.

Spacious accommodation and relatively clean. Remote for reverse system was absent. Neighbours were noisy. Could hear a mouse run around in the early mornings. Staff very willing to listen to issues and reapond.
Sehr schöner Ort. Margaret River Touristen Park ist sehr schön ,die Cabine ist sauber und ausreichend

Great park. Sites can be a bit tight to get into, but loads that are paved or have mats insitu. Clean amenities, great staff, close to town and reasonably priced. Good value for money. Highly recommend..
The only problem was not enough flags, signage and lighting outside the entrance.

Lovely place only downfall was when we booked asked if there was certain facilities in the cabin and they said there was but had to change cabins because it didn't but staff we're very helpful and polite have been there before and will definitely be back
Perfect locations - big unit for couple yet so homey
Very quiet park. Good space. Ensuites are a bit dated.

No complaints about the park.  Surroundings great, facilities good. The only thing that let me down was the way they priced the accommodation.  I called to get a price which was $42. Ok fine. When I called back 2hrs later spoke to someone else who then said $44 a night.  I queried the difference and the response was it changes on the demand.  It changed even though it was only 2 hrs. After 2 days we decided to stay an extra night. $32. Ok great. Then because of bad weather we decided to extend an extra 4 days and the cost per night jumped to $52per night   Very disappointing. A hike of $20 per night. Needless to say we took our business elsewhere.  Even the stock market doesn't vary that much.
ANOTHER BIG LESSON LEARNED
Lovely cabin and all facilities were great!

Location quite strategic, 15 minutes walking distance to the town for food / groceries. The cottage was clean and cosy, there is kitchen inside the cottage and BBQ & hot-grilled facilities available in the park.

Great location, easy to walk everywhere 👌🙏
Our unit was absolutely spotless as was the tourist park . Fantastic staff , very friendly ❤️❤️❤️
Ablutions could be modernised. Sites were rather close together. Otherwise it's a nice, safe park.

Stayed there about two weeks ago in autumn with no special events happening in the region. Powered sites are advertised on their website as "from $36". When we were charged $57.20, I asked why there was a difference of $21.20. She said the prices are seasonal. When I asked what "season" we were in, she couldn't answer me. Also, the extractor fan covers in the bathroom haven't been cleaned for many, many "seasons". The exit gate is a bottleneck. We waited for 15 minutes to get out while people were checking in, as two vehicles and vans blocked the entrance - not their fault - the entrance isn't wide enough.
Clean and tidy cabin.

Best park ever. Stayed in the RV. So nice with all the trees surrounding us. The amenities second to none, clean, the kitchen area absolutely brilliant. The staff that greeted us were friendly as. I can't speak highly enough of the park.
Very good
Really enjoyed our stay in the 2 bedroom cabin. Big rooms, good facilities and clean. Would definitely come back and stay again.
Excellent location, very quiet and very close to scenic spot, good deal
Great spot to stay when adventuring around the area.
Everything you need and only a short stroll to the main strip. Staff were lovely and informative on arrival to the park.

Great location!! So close to town centre. Amenities were good and grounds were regularly taken care off - nice and clean.
Quick and easy check in and check out process. Would definitely recommend this place.

The stay was ok. Unpowered station for 43$ per night. Kitchen totally unfurnished for that price (?) Wifi not available in any common areas and not even in the camp spot. Also was Impossibile to find a socket to charge the phone.

We had a bad experience. They robbed us at night while we were sleeping and according to the responses of the managers it seemed to indicate that it is common. There is no security and they don't warn about this either. I would not go back .

Came here for a family holiday, and we enjoyed every moment. The cottage we were in was spacious and clean, and for once, the mattresses were soft. We asked for a cot as we had our 18 months old with us and got it free. Even though we were hardly at the Park, it was still a place worth coming back to after a long day of touring.
Great Caravan Park, fantastic location and amenities are old but very clean.
Well located within walking distance to town. Choice of chalets & caravan sites with pool, camp kitchen & laundry facilities. Staff are very friendly.
We stayed in cabin W, it was good. Needs a new washer in cold water tap over vanity. Would be good to have instruction booklet for aircon. Thank you.

I would give it a 5 stars but due to the shoddy wifi.. i had to minus one... having a strong wifi is good for tourists like us to prep for our next drive destinations... eating up quite abit of the data cos of the planning n stuffs... still the stay is great! Room is clean.. though i think the cottage 13 which i stayed..the frying pan would need a change soon... the non stick stuffs are all scratched n coming off... abit unhealthy to cook with such pan.

Location is great... near to supermarket n town center! Stayed alone. =)

I am normally not the type of person to leave a bad review but this just not isn’t good enough. My partner booked accomodation to stay here in November/December for this weekend with the option to pay when we arrived this afternoon. After realising that he had not received a confirmation/welcome email this week, we found a cancellation email in his junk mail. It is not the company’s fault that the email went to junk, but there was no other method of contact about the cancellation. We did not receive any phone calls or messages to tell us his booking had been cancelled. We attempted to call 3 times to see if we could get it sorted but it went straight to voicemail.

Would avoid this place at all costs, terrible service and communication.
Great value for family stay.

The park is in a good location close to town so very convenient if you want to go for a walk. The caravan site was good although a bit tight but close to amenities and good shade. Two amenities blocks, both clean and well maintained although the hot water in the showers was spasmodic. Awesome staff in reception - very busy over Easter but did everything possible to accommodate our booking changes. Thanks guys - we had a great two weeks with you. Garry and Annie🙏
Well informed, great gift ideas

Poor toilet/shower amenities in need of refurbishment, low water pressure, unstable water temperatures, dirty facilities regularly full in the mornings and evenings, poor access to some sites. Wi-fi was basically useless. Disappointing.
Pleasant stay except for the possums in the roof. Stayed again but disappointed cash is no longer a deposit for a gate key. We don't all like leaving credit card details everywhere
Wonderful Park! Lauren was super helpful and accommodating in finding us a last minute site when our previous accommodation fell through. Will return for sure!

The first half of our stay was decent, it is located directly near a primary school and industrial area so not overly quiet throughout the day.
Definitely do not recommend staying over the weekend unless you’re okay with listening to rowdy drunk teenagers show little regard and respect for others on the camp, carrying on, yelling until 2am.

Although caravan sites aren’t bad, amenities were average and struggled to find a shower that actually worked properly.

It is in a good location in regards to distance from the town centre which seemed to be the only plus throughout our stay.

The managers here (11/3/24) are fabulous, and the park has been cleaned up a lot since we were last here, the grounds are like a garden, with trimmed hedges and pencil pines. Saw lots of small birds playing in the grevillea and kangaroo paw bushes outside our cabin window.
The cabin was spotless on our arrival, bed very comfortable, and we were able to use our Chromecast on the tv. Charged our electric Atto 3 BYD onsite at a charge point. Highly recommended.

Campingplatz nur ca. 10min Fussmarsch vom Zentrum entfernt. Sanitäranlagen sind sauber aber schon sehr in die Jahre gekommen (wie auf fast jedem australischen Zeltplatz). Ausserdem ist das W-Lan grottenschlecht und funktioniert nur an bestimmten Orten - hey wir haben 2024, selbst im tiefsten Afrika ist das Internet besser 🤯
Good c/van park well maintained and clean, family friendly, pet friendly, staff helpful, ammenenties clean,  some sites a bit tight to get into but you get that sometimes, park close to town
Lovely place to crash for the night 🌙 or 2 or more. Clean friendly cabins close to town. Highly recommend

The camping is really well located… but unfortunately if you want to camp, pay a bit more and go to the RAC campground.
Powered sites no shadow and the grass sucks they don’t take any care the place.
Great campsite, however they closed the toilets for cleaning at 9:30am which meant we couldn’t shower before checkout at 10am. Very frustrating.
Caravan park was amazing but there is no air-conditioning in bedrooms was stiverling asked for fan by one member of staff not pleasant and nothing on fans no note to say no,

Midden in Margaret River! In dit park met caravans en campers, hebben wij een 1 bedroom cabin gehuurd. Heel goed uitgerust met koelkast vriezer oven gasfornuis afwasmachine Nespresso apparaat airco en terras. Absoluut een prima plek ‼️

Clean, comfortable. location close to town. Ideal for a break and to visit surrounding attractions Hamelin Bay beach and Cape Leeuwin lighthouse. Cave Road has 4 caves you can choose from (closed toe shoes required) and many many many vineyards to choose from.

I didn't expect it to be as good as it was, my cabin was larger and more well equipped than I expected and incredibly clean!
The facilities in the park are great, my son loved the giant trampoline and the pool looked very inviting.
Staff are all excellent and the location is very convenient.
Will definitely be coming back in the future.
Easy walk to the main street, facilities old but well-maintained, reasonably-sized pool, jumping pillow for the kids, easy scoot to local skate park, 10km to beach

I went there with my family. The location is great. It has nice and clean kitchen with clean bathroom and also swimming pool. I have my little one and she enjoyed there because lot of activities for kids.

Since last year, I've visited Margaret River three times, consistently booking this property each visit and securing another for the coming year.

A heartfelt thank you to the fantastic staff and management. I made an unfortunate error with my last booking, resulting in a missed trip. Despite my oversight in not properly checking the dates, they cooperated to transfer my booking fees to my new reservation.

Our 2nd Christmas 🎄 here at the park, thinking it may be our new Christmas time home away from home. The staff are wonderful and the facilities are great too. Close walk to town and kids large and small are catered for with things to do. Fantastic!!

Location was great, facilities were great but the size of the caravan sites was pretty small. We only have a 16ft caravan at it just fit. By the time we got out a table and two chairs that was pretty much all the room left on the site. A 3x3 gazebo would have been hard up against our van and our neighbours. All the lots numbered in the 30s on the bitumen were all the same. Heaps of room on the grasses sites and even more on the unpowered sites.
Beautiful Park. Big bathrooms and comfy beds. Reasonable price.

We enjoyed our stay. Great sites, with good tree cover and nice amount of space between sites. Clean facilities well spaces out and good playground with jumping pillow. Only negatives was the family of Euro’s walking through our site, like under our ropes, back and forth for 2 days and nights, until midnight, but hay, that’s not the parks fault! The park in nice and central to the main street of Margret River, great location, we would definitely stay again
Great location, 2 bedroom cottage very spacious and kitchen big and had all amenities to cook.
Wir waren mit dem eigenen Wohnmobil dort. Platz gut gepflegt, alles da, was wird brauchten.
Great spot to base from, close to town.

It’s alright and decent price point in Margaret river. Bathroom was cleaned every second day, dead bugs all over the floor. And no privacy between each campsite, feels so cramped up with loud music being played by neighbour every night. Slow wifi speed.
Fantastic place accommodation is clean and comfortable close to town staff friendly.
Very clean, convenient, walking distance from town. Would stay there again!
Close to the city! Just few mins drive!

It's a decent motel. Generous facilities, lots of stuff to do for kids, and spacious rooms, albeit a steep price point. My experience was generally fine, but it's pretty much it. It's just alright.

The few peeves, wifi is very shoddy in general, straight up not working sometimes. The interior of the motel isn't the most pretty looking thing ever, however the entire park itself makes up for it. It's real pretty. The rules keep people in check, and there weren't any real bumps I came across while staying here. It's a perfectly serviceable motel.
We had a power site . Kitchen space are very good . Not a big space but sufficient spacing for each other . Very worth it . We had the one near the toilet and it’s awesome .
Great facilities and very clean,nice pitch, friendly staff.
Lovely clean rooms ,great facilities to use, easy access very secure staff were very friendly and helpful, will recommend to friends and family
Goed geholpen.

Lovely 2 bed cottage.  Beds super comfy, kitchen well outfitted.  Lovely big couches to sprawl out on.  Shower so-so -very little water pressure and with the two taps rather than a mixer hard to get right temp wise.  Also tiled floor in shower very slippery!  Beautiful tourist park with lovely grounds to go with.
Quite and tidy, good value for money
Stayed there for 2 nights. Really an enjoyable and fantastic experience. Visited a couple of wineries in Margaret River. Also explored nearby towns of Augusta and Busselton.
WiFi very patchy needs improvement.
We stayed in a two bedroom cabin. Our stay was very comfortable, the cabin was very clean and exactly as advertised. The park was beautiful and calming. We would stay again
Great place will be back .
Nice campsite, good location as it's a close walk into the town. Although had battery bank and other bits stolen when left unattended in a public space so be careful.

Great park centrally located, easy access to town and surrounds.

The facilities were kept well cleaned but they need to be updated. The fittings etc are a bit worn out.

We had a great site that was nice and big.
Great place for the weekend away. Close to the town centre and attractions. Rooms are nice and clean.
Really nice park within a short walk to town. Excellent facilities and swimming pool. Would stay again

Stayed for 2 nights and what a great experience.  The room was tidy and clean.  There was a gas stove with 4 heads. There was an elaborate storage of cutleries and cookeries.  There was a TV and a functional AC/ heater as well. It was really close to the Main Street and the market.  Highly recommended
Lovely camp site

Great little weekend getaway
Kids had a great time and loved the pool and jumping pillow. We stayed in a double room cabin that was immaculately clean. A great bonus was that it had 2 bathrooms.

We spent two nights in the One Bedroom Cottage, and it is incredibly roomy for two people, especially the kitchen and living area. I was genuinely impressed by how meticulously the kitchen utensils were organized in the drawers. Aside from the poor Wi-Fi, which forced us to rely on our SIM card, there were no other complaints. Additionally, it's worth noting that you might be treated to a lullaby by the birds and insects serenading you as you sleep; they can be quite loud since the bed is located next to the window.

Would have been 5 stars, the rooms are comfortable and modern, with a fully equipped kitchen and good laundry facilities, but for some concerning issues with payment. Be sure to call and have your old card details deleted off the system after your stay.
Easy check in. Great helpful staff. Will be back
Neat and tidy with efficient staff

Very well cleaned cottage. I was impressed with the nice smell once I got in. Electric blankets and heaters were amazing. Great working  stove and oven. Managed to cook and bake delicious meals for the family. Nice and cozy accommodation.

We stayed 7nights, caravan powered site.  Short walk to main street of Margaret River with plenty of restaurants/cafes and shopping.  Only a short drive to all the attractions of M.R and attractions of other towns close by. The amenities were very clean and the park was clean tidy and well maintained.
A lovely, quiet, relaxing atmosphere. Obviously the owners/managers take a great deal of pride in their service of their customers and park.
Thank you for a very pleasant stay.
There were a bouncy castle and a children's park for kids.
Great Park, Very clean, some of the paved pads you park your van on are very uneven due to tree roots, 10 min walking distance to town.
Affordable self contained chalet does the job.  Clean and easy to find.  Would come back again.
Unit all we required. Bed uncomfortable. Underlay I suspect was synthetic as it was hot to sleep on almost as though there was a electric blanket.
Nice park. Older but very clean amenities. Close to town and not far from beach 5km.
Such a brilliant park. Clean, spacious and well kept. A great place to stay when discovering the surroundings.
Got a triplex for the weekend! Very clean and tidy, walls are thin but…

The rooms are ideal and provide everything you need. Great service from the staff and the facilities are always clean. Super location for everything.

The wifi is not great nor is the reception locally so this is more of a town problem than the fault of the park. MR town should make an effort to fix this.

Will definitely be returning.
Friendly staff.  Amenities clean. Good camp kitchen and laundry. You can walk to shops.
Neat, quiet and safe place. I highly recommend to my friends.
Great
Great Park, central well kept ad clean.
Site was same as last time we were here so close to amenities, kitchen etc, staff were friendly in all a lovely park
Brilliant cabins with everything you need in a super quiet location quite close to the shopping centre. Would definitely stay here again.
Pretty decent cabins and amenities.

The staff are all very friendly and helpful. I had my own caravan and stayed on an ensuite site, so I can't comment on the rooms nor the amenities. The laundry has 2 washing machines and 2 dryers. The dryers don't heat up as much as they should, so it could take longer, depending on your load.
The caravan ensuite sites are mostly of a good size, the ensuite is smaller than some but still plenty of room. Plenty of hot water with good showers. The park seems to be well maintained and it's lovely and quiet. Plus it's pet friendly!

Beautiful and safe place for camping. Cottages are spacious. Clean surroundings. Laundry, Public kitchen, swimming pool, toilets, electric connections etc are available here. Surrounded with compound wall, feels safer for camping.
Stayed in an ensuite van spot.  Really great experience.  Clean, warm showers.  Well done
